creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text: In general a report like this is more likely to be handled in a timely manner if posted to the freebsd-stable mailing list rather than submitting a PR, however in either case you'll need to include (a portion of) the actual build log showing the actual error you encountered. Please follow up with an excerpt of the build log including the error and the surrounding context (perhaps as many as 50 or 100 lines).
